title: What is that weird clock angel
display_title: What is that weird clock angel
wikitext:
[]: What is that weird clock angel? Post by Eva Unit 18 » Fri May 15, 2009 10:45 am Have you guys seen that weird angel that looks like a clock from the trailer? Sorry I couldn"t get a picture

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri May 15, 2009 11:16 am Picture and description. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=236529#236529 ^ Funny stuff. It's gotten quite a bit of attention here. More: http://v2.boardtracker.com/search/?page=1&boardid=3783&for=0&search=clock+angel&cat=1&order=1&scope=2

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri May 15, 2009 11:25 am Huh, Reichu left the thread open. I guess that means opening threads like this is OK.

[]: Post by Axell » Fri May 15, 2009 12:44 pm quick before its locked! Maybe this should just be a clocky only speculation thread. Anyone else think t might have time based attacks?

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Fri May 15, 2009 12:52 pm It's a time-controlling Angel responsible for rebooting the original Evaverse, creating Rebuild. Therefore, Sequel theory OMG

[]: Post by schismatics » Fri May 15, 2009 1:11 pm Axell wrote: quick before its locked! Maybe this should just be a clocky only speculation thread. Anyone else think t might have time based attacks?

[]: Post by Axell » Fri May 15, 2009 1:26 pm to clear something up rolo didnt stop time, he stopped peoples perception of time

[]: Post by Kazi » Fri May 15, 2009 2:24 pm schismatics wrote: All like Rolo from Geass S2??? It for all intensive purposes stops time???

[]: Post by Omegagouki » Fri May 15, 2009 5:27 pm If it's replacing Gaghiel... Maybe it IS Gaghiel, and they just totally redesigned him?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri May 15, 2009 5:56 pm Omegagouki wrote: If it's replacing Gaghiel... Maybe it IS Gaghiel, and they just totally redesigned him?

[]: Post by schismatics » Fri May 15, 2009 7:31 pm Axell wrote: to clear something up rolo didnt stop time, he stopped peoples perception of time

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri May 15, 2009 7:55 pm It's a misconstruction of "for all intents and purposes". People misconstrue what they hear and it takes off from there. http://wiki.answers.com/Q/Is_the_saying_%27all_intents_and_purposes%27_or_%27all_intense_purposes%27
